item.title: MIUI OS3.0.313.0.WBLCNXM Fastboot update for Xiaomi 17 Pro China
item.description:
New Stable Fastboot update available!

Device: Xiaomi 17 Pro China

Codename: pandora

Version: OS3.0.313.0.WBLCNXM | 16.0

Size: 12.2 GB

MD5: 58cff8c4798626f49e9aedd053943152

Changelog:
[System]
Fix: Overheating issues in some cases

Download: Here

item.title: MIUI OS3.0.315.0.WBLCNXM Recovery update for Xiaomi 17 Pro China
item.description:
New Stable Beta Recovery update available!

Device: Xiaomi 17 Pro China

Codename: pandora

Version: OS3.0.315.0.WBLCNXM | 16.0

Size: 8.7 GB

MD5: e3be6d89d1e593663b561d9dec4a6d76

Changelog:
[System]
Optimization: Memory management for improved system smoothness
Fix: Background processes could start unexpectedly in some scenarios
Fix: High refresh rate didn't work in some third party apps
Fix: PDF documents weren't fully displayed in some cases
[Rear display]
New: When the front screen is unlocked, the rear display now turns off automatically to help extend battery life

Download: Here

Incremental Update: Here
